name: oneworld-explorer
description: Plan and validate oneworld Explorer round-the-world fare routes

scripts.build: npm run build -w @oneworld-explorer/core && npm run build -w @oneworld-explorer/schedules && npm run build:geography-atlas && npm run build -w @oneworld-explorer/web
scripts.test:ci: npm run validate && npm test && npm run build && npm run test:smoke && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:e2e:visual
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @oneworld-explorer/core && npm run build -w @oneworld-explorer/schedules && npm run typecheck -w @oneworld-explorer/core && npm run typecheck -w @oneworld-explorer/schedules && npm run typecheck -w @oneworld-explorer/web
scripts.refresh:routes: npm run fetch:routes-vendor && npm run build:routes -- --offline
scripts.validate: npm run validate:country-map && npm run validate:traceability && npm run validate:airports && npm run validate:pdf-audit && npm run validate:routes
